com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators  

    • Uses of PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators declared as PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener PolynomialRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators that return PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener PolynomialRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Gets listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static PolynomialRobustEstimator PolynomialRobustEstimator.create(int degree, List<PolynomialEvaluation> evaluations, PolynomialRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates a robust polynomial estimator using provided degree, evaluations, listener and default method.
